testsuite.name: com.example.SimulationWebSocketTest

testcase.name: queue mode overload emits backlog and end-to-end latency()
conservation of requests — admitted equals completed plus inFlight plus post-admission queue()
ControlMessage round-trips through JSON with all fields preserved()
reject mode separates admission rate from completion rate()

testsuite.system-out: 11:00:11.983 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-1 @call-context#312] INFO io.ktor.test - No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 11:00:11.991 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-1 @call-context#312] INFO io.ktor.test - Application started in 0.012 seconds. 11:00:11.992 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#313] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at http://localhost:80 11:00:11.992 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#313] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at https://localhost:443 11:00:14.234 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-1 @call-context#391] INFO io.ktor.test - No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 11:00:14.236 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-1 @call-context#391] INFO io.ktor.test - Application started in 0.002 seconds. 11:00:14.237 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-8 @coroutine#392] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at http://localhost:80 11:00:14.237 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-8 @coroutine#392] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at https://localhost:443 11:00:16.456 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-5 @call-context#438] INFO io.ktor.test - No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 11:00:16.458 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-5 @call-context#438] INFO io.ktor.test - Application started in 0.003 seconds. 11:00:16.458 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-10 @coroutine#439] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at http://localhost:80 11:00:16.458 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-10 @coroutine#439] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at https://localhost:443
